name: Microsoft File Share
description: This plugin is used to pull a CSV file from the remote server via the SMB or SFTP protocol and to generate EDM hashes of the pulled CSV file.

configuration.label: Protocol
configuration.name: protocol
configuration.labelInfo: Select protocol to use to pull the CSV file from the remote server. SMB protocol is natively designed for Microsoft-based systems. Pulling the file using SFTP protocol is comparatively faster and it requires to have OpenSSH service enabled on remote system.

fields.label: Protocol Name
fields.description: Protocol to use to pull the CSV file from the Windows server.

configuration.label: Preview Sanitization Results
configuration.labelInfo: Preview the output of the first 20 records with sanitization performed on the data pulled from the Microsoft remote server. If the 'Proceed without sanitization' is unchecked, only the Good file will be used for EDM Hash generation. In this case, review the Bad file and update the sanitization parameters or data source to prevent important records from being excluded. If the 'Proceed without sanitization' is checked, all data without sanitization will be used for EDM Hash generation.
configuration.name: sanity_results
